query: Finishing a messy breakfast at the counter and wanting the house to look tidy, can you handle a couple things in the bathroom. Set blinds 1 in bathroom to 10.0% closed in 9 minutes from now and then set blinds 1 in bathroom to fully closed in 12 minutes after the previous action so the mirror doesn't catch the morning glare while I wipe the table. Also since I'll be boiling water, power up fan 1 in bathroom to power on plus fan 30% in 25 minutes from now and then bump it to power on plus fan 80% in 12 minutes after the previous action to clear the steam quickly.

steps.thought: I'll first verify the current time and get the list of rooms, then explore the bathroom devices to confirm blinds and fan exist and understand their control clusters.
Now I'll get the rooms list to confirm the bathroom exists and get its exact room_id.
Good, the bathroom exists. Now let's get the devices in the bathroom to find the blinds and fan.
Now I need to explore the structure of the window covering and fan to understand the clusters and commands/attributes.
Let's get documentation on WindowCovering cluster to understand the GoToLiftPercentage command semantics.

error.detail: The api_key client option must be set either by passing api_key to the client or by setting the OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable

steps.thought: The documentation query failed; I'll proceed based on device structure. Now explore the fan to understand its clusters.

I'll schedule the four actions: (1) blinds to 10% at 13:27:54, (2) blinds to 100% at 13:39:54, (3) fan on + 30% at 13:43:54, (4) fan 80% at 13:55:54. I'll do it step by step. First, schedule blind first action.
Now schedule the second blind action (fully closed at 13:39:54).
All four workflows have been scheduled successfully. I'll summarize the actions for the user.

action_input.answer: All set! I've scheduled the following in the bathroom: (1) Blinds 1 will move to 10% closed at 1:27 PM (9 min from now). (2) Then fully closed at 1:39 PM (12 min later). (3) Fan 1 will turn on and set to 30% at 1:43 PM (25 min from now). (4) Then fan speed bumped to 80% at 1:55 PM (12 min later). Enjoy your tidy house and boiling water!

(3) Fan 1 will turn on and set to 30% at 1:43 PM (25 min from now). (4) Then fan speed bumped to 80% at 1:55 PM (12 min later). Enjoy your tidy house and boiling water!
